title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally via a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async/sync Python client for Ollama; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (pip install langchain-ollama) to use Ollama models as LLM, embeddings and tool-calling backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; one Docker command to get a multi-user playground.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library published to Maven Central; async & sync generators.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting, generating and pulling models from Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into inline Copilot suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for query answering and embedding pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chat, voice bots, function-calling, fine-tuning tips, Docker compose stacks.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) with docker-compose examples for persistent model cache.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All UI branch that adds Ollama as a backend option alongside llama.cpp.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that streams Ollama replies with session memory.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG template using LangChain, Chroma and Ollama embeddings; pip install ready.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS with GPU flags.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop & friends.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.
